{{Quote|Drall is a sleepy backwater.|Mara Jade|<ref name="AaS">''[[Assault at Selonia]]''</ref>}}
'''Drall''' was a pleasant, temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], being one of the [[Five Brothers/Legends|Five Brothers]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Drall/Legends|Drall]], and was famous for its great food and the [[Boiling Sea]].

==History==
===Pre Republic===
{{Quote|You saw how it shoved those rocks back up as they fell. That confirmed what I suspected. This place is a repulsor, a planet-sized repulsor, powerful enough to move the whole world of Drall. It did move the world of Drall, once, long ago.|Marcha, describing the planetary repulsor on Drall|<ref name="AaS" />}}
It was believed that the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]] moved the planet into [[Corell/Legends|Corell's]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] from an unknown location, along with its four brother planets, facilitated by subterranean [[planetary repulsor]]s and [[Centerpoint Station]]. It became populated with a [[Species/Legends|species]] that shared the name with the planet, the [[Drall]], who organized themselves into clans. While the planet came to have a few large cities, such as [[Mastigophorous (city)|Mastigophorous]], it was never considered to be more than a backwater world.<ref name="AaS" />

Prior to [[35,000 BBY]], Drall [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Tiran]] developed the [[Theory of Universal Reference]].<ref name="MS1">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>

Around [[36,453 BBY]], the planet was annexed by the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]]. At some point after [[30,000 BBY]], the Empire began suffering from slave revolts that lead to a [[Rakatan Civil War|civil war]]. By [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,200 BBY]] a plague spread through the Rakata, causing the Empire to collapse, freeing Drall.<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

===Galactic Republic===
[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] had joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as one of its [[Core Founder/Legends|Core Founders]] in [[25,053 BBY]].<ref name="SWTOR">{{Holonet|allegiances|galactic-republic|The Galactic Republic}}</ref> Drall itself was ruled by the [[Confederation of the Clans]].<ref name="SoF" />

Around [[312 BBY]], King [[Berethron e Solo]] abolished the monarchy and the Corellian System, including Drall, became ruled by a new government, lead by a [[Diktat]].<ref name="TCoPL">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>

===Later years===
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Galactic Republic became the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Episode III">{{Film|III}}</ref> The Empire took control of the Corellian Sector, and appointed Diktat [[Daclif Gallamby]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].<ref name="AaS" />

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the Corellian Sector joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and Gallamby was replaced with [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] [[Micamberlecto]]. His influence was very little, as the strict oversight of the Galactic Republic and the Galactic Empire was gone, and various extremist groups began popping up on the worlds in the Corellian System, such as the [[Drallist Front]], who assumed power on Drall.<ref name="AaC">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref> The Drallists and the other groups were supported by the [[Sacorrian Triad]], who were attempting to cause an [[Corellian Crisis|uprising]] in order to give them an opportunity to break away from the New Republic and form an independent state. Each group was ordered by the Triad to search for the planetary repulsor on their respective planet to use in the uprisings.<ref name="TNEC" /> Eventually, riots between different species began breaking out across each planet in the Corellian System, though the New Republic was able to regain control and was victorious.<ref name="SaC">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref>

Drall was later [[Blockade of Corellia|blockaded]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Bloodlines">''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''</ref>
